creator: liangtai.s16@gmail.com
text:
* Update qmmp-plugin-pack to version 0.7.3
* Adopt the latest options framework on multimedia/qmmp-plugin-pack
  and multimedia/qmmp
* At qmmp, use general terms for option knobs from Mk/bsd.option.desc.mk:
  - Replace option knob APIDOC with DOXYGEN
  - Replace option knob PULSE_AUDIO with PULSEAUDIO
  

http://github.com/liangtai/FreeBSD-ports/
